query:
UPDATE products SET imageUrl = CASE 
  WHEN asin = 'B08KQMVXVL' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71gHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B08L7QXQZJ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71mHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B07YKZQ8ZV' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71B6xDkQ5GL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B08QKXQVQZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71gHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B07Z5QXQXZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71mHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B08RKXQZQZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71B6xDkQ5GL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B07YQXQZQZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71gHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B08LKXQZQZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71mHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B07XQXQZQZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71B6xDkQ5GL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B08MKXQZQZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71gHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B0BLK7NRLM' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71gHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  ELSE imageUrl
END WHERE asin LIKE 'B0%' AND asin NOT IN ('B08GOLD002', 'B08GOLD003', 'B08SILV001', 'B08SILV002', 'B08BRAC001', 'B08BRAC002', 'B08RING001', 'B08RING003', 'B08RING004');
command:

  WHEN asin = 'B07Z5QXQXZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71mHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B08RKXQZQZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71B6xDkQ5GL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B07YQXQZQZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71gHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
  WHEN asin = 'B08LKXQZQZ' THEN 'https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71mHvnHvPGL._AC_SY879_.jpg'
